HomePage.title: To get started, edit the page.tsx file.

agreement.agree_pdpa: I have read and accepted the terms and conditions of using the platform, including the privacy policy and personal data protection (PDPA), and I consent to the collection of my personal data as specified in the terms of service.
agreement.agree_marketing: I consent to the collection and disclosure of my personal data to Ampol Food Group, its affiliated companies, and platform service providers for marketing purposes and the provision of personalized benefits.
agreement.text_login/register: Please provide your phone number to accumulate points or receive various privileges.
agreement.error_request_otp_failed: Failed to request OTP. Please try again later.
agreement.error_invalid_phone: Invalid phone number. Please enter a valid 10-digit phone number.
agreement.text_confirm_otp: Enter the 6-digit OTP sent to your phone number. If you haven't received it, please request a new one.
agreement.error_invalid_otp: Invalid OTP. Please enter the correct 6-digit OTP.

setprofile.text_set_profile: Please provide your profile details to receive personalized benefits.
setprofile.error_invalid_email: Invalid email address. Please check again.
setprofile.error_email_exists: This email is already in use. Please use another email.
setprofile.error_session_expired: Your session has expired. Please start again.
setprofile.error_register_failed: Unable to save your profile. Please try again.
setprofile.success_register_text: Your profile has been saved. We will take you to privileges.

account.error_update_text: Error updating profile. Please try again later.

my_qrcode.show_qr_to_staff: Please show this QR to the staff to collect points
